ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Create (Don't ask again)
ast.target: 创建（不再询问）

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Move up
ast.target: 上移

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Move down
ast.target: 下移

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Add folder setting
ast.target: 添加文件夹设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If enabled, the width of the navigation header will match the line length of the note.
              Here, "line length" refers to the width defined when Obsidian's "Readable line length"
              option is enabled.
ast.target:
启用后，导航标题的宽度将与笔记的行长度一致。
              此处的“行长度”指的是在 Obsidian 的“可读行长度”
              选项启用时所定义的宽度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If you want to use file properties to specify the note's display text, set the
              property name to this field. Leave this field blank if you are not using this feature.
ast.target:
如果你想使用文件属性来指定笔记的显示文本，请将属性名称设置到此字段。
              如果不使用此功能，请将此字段留空。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Filter out duplicates when multiple links with the same destination are detected.
              This setting does not apply to prev/next/parent-type links and pinned note contents.
ast.target:
当检测到多个指向同一目标的链接时，过滤重复项。
              此设置不适用于 prev/next/parent 类型的链接以及固定的笔记内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Specify the filtering priority.
              For example, if you specify \u{1F3E0},\u2B06\uFE0F,\u{1F4CC},\u{1F517} here,
              links with "\u{1F3E0}" will be displayed with the highest priority.
ast.target:
指定过滤优先级。
              例如，如果你在此处指定 \u{1F3E0},\u2B06\uFE0F,\u{1F4CC},\u{1F517}，
              带有“\u{1F3E0}”的链接将以最高优先级显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Display a loading message ("Loading...") in the navigation header
              while links are being loaded.
ast.target: 在加载链接时，在导航栏中显示加载消息（"Loading..."）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a placeholder ("No links") when there is nothing to display.
ast.target: 当没有内容可显示时，显示占位符（"No links"）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Display a confirmation dialog when a new file is created.
              This option is currently only used for periodic notes.
ast.target:
创建新文件时显示确认对话框。
              此选项目前仅用于周期性笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Show navigation header when notes are opened in panes.
              This setting applies to note containers (panes). To show the navigation header,
              also enable view-specific options below.
ast.target:
在窗格中打开笔记时显示导航栏。
              此设置适用于笔记容器（窗格）。要显示导航栏，
              还需启用下方的视图特定选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Show navigation header when notes are shown in page previews.
              This setting applies to note containers (page previews).
              To show the navigation header, also enable view-specific options below.
ast.target:
在页面预览中显示笔记时显示导航栏。
              此设置适用于笔记容器（页面预览）。
              要显示导航栏，还需启用下方的视图特定选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show navigation header when viewing Markdown documents.
ast.target: 查看 Markdown 文档时显示导航栏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show navigation header when viewing images.
ast.target: 查看图片时显示导航栏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show navigation header when viewing videos.
ast.target: 查看视频时显示导航标题栏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show navigation header when viewing audio.
ast.target: 查看音频时显示导航标题栏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show navigation header when viewing PDFs.
ast.target: 查看 PDF 时显示导航标题栏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show navigation header when viewing Canvas.
ast.target: 查看 Canvas 时显示导航标题栏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show navigation header when viewing Bases.
ast.target: 查看 Bases 时显示导航标题栏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Show navigation header in other views (such as views introduced by community plugins).
          This may not work depending on the view type.
ast.target:
在其他视图中显示导航标题栏（例如社区插件引入的视图）。
          这可能会因视图类型而不起作用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Define the annotation strings for links in the current note.
              This setting works the same way as "Annotation strings for backlinks",
              but applies to links in the current note.
ast.target:
定义当前笔记中链接的标注字符串。
              此设置的工作方式与“反向链接的标注字符串”相同，
              但适用于当前笔记中的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
An advanced version of "Annotation strings for current note".
              The syntax is the same as that of "Advanced annotation strings for backlinks".
ast.target:
“当前笔记的标注字符串”的高级版本。
              语法与“反向链接的高级标注字符串”相同。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If enabled, a link will still be recognized as an annotated link even if there is a
              space between the annotation string and the link.
ast.target:
如果启用，即使标注字符串与链接之间有空格，
              该链接仍会被识别为标注链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Enter the mapping that specifies the previous note. The note specified here will
              appear in the navigation header as < previous | parent | next >.
              The syntax is the same as "Property mappings".
ast.target:
输入用于指定上一条笔记的映射。此处指定的笔记将
              以 < previous | parent | next > 的形式显示在导航标题栏中。
              语法与“属性映射”相同。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Enter the mapping that specifies the next note. The note specified here will appear
              in the navigation header as < previous | parent | next >.
              The syntax is the same as "Property mappings".
ast.target:
输入用于指定下一条笔记的映射。此处指定的笔记将显示在导航标题中为 < previous | parent | next >。
              语法与“Property mappings”相同。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Enter the mapping that specifies the parent note. The note specified here will appear
              in the navigation header as < previous | parent | next >.
              The syntax is the same as "Property mappings".
ast.target:
输入用于指定父级笔记的映射。此处指定的笔记将显示在导航标题中为 < previous | parent | next >。
              语法与“Property mappings”相同。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Specify the display style of prev/next/parent links in the navigation header.
              Full: < previous | parent | next >,
              Full (double separator): < previous || parent || next >,
              Separator: previous | parent | next,
              Double separator: previous || parent || next,
              None: previous parent next.
ast.target:
指定导航标题中 prev/next/parent 链接的显示样式。
              完整：< previous | parent | next >，
              完整（双分隔符）：< previous || parent || next >，
              分隔符：previous | parent | next，
              双分隔符：previous || parent || next，
              无：previous parent next。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Specify pairs of property names here to implicitly create reciprocal links
              in the navigation header. For example, if you enter prev:next here,
              when Note A has a property "next: [[Note B]]", Note B will be treated as if
              it also had "prev: [[Note A]]" even if it isn't explicitly set.
              Enter one pair per line.
ast.target:
在此指定成对的属性名，以在导航标题中隐式创建互相链接。例如，如果你在此输入 prev:next，
              当笔记 A 具有属性 "next: [[Note B]]" 时，笔记 B 将被视为也具有
              "prev: [[Note A]]"，即使未显式设置。
              每行输入一对。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
To use this option, daily notes must be enabled
              in Daily Notes plugin or Periodic Notes plugin.
ast.target: 要使用此选项，必须在 Daily Notes 插件或 Periodic Notes 插件中启用每日笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: To use this option, weekly notes must be enabled in Periodic Notes plugin.
ast.target: 要使用此选项，必须在 Periodic Notes 插件中启用每周笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: To use this option, monthly notes must be enabled in Periodic Notes plugin.
ast.target: 要使用此选项，必须在 Periodic Notes 插件中启用每月笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: To use this option, quarterly notes must be enabled in Periodic Notes plugin.
ast.target: 要使用此选项，必须在 Periodic Notes 插件中启用季度笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: To use this option, yearly notes must be enabled in Periodic Notes plugin.
ast.target: 要使用此选项，必须在 Periodic Notes 插件中启用年度笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Specify the display style of links in the navigation header.
              Full: < previous | parent | next >,
              Full (double separator): < previous || parent || next >,
              Separator: previous | parent | next,
              Double separator: previous || parent || next,
              None: previous parent next.
ast.target:
指定导航标题中链接的显示样式。
              完整：< previous | parent | next >，
              完整（双分隔符）：< previous || parent || next >，
              分隔符：previous | parent | next，
              双分隔符：previous || parent || next，
              无：previous parent next。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, code blocks will be ignored when searching for pinned content.
ast.target: 启用后，搜索置顶内容时将忽略代码块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
For each folder specified here, files in the same folder as the currently opened
                file will be shown in the navigation header. Multiple folders can be specified
                (enter one path per line). Glob patterns are supported
                (e.g., **: all folders; *: all folders directly under root;
                folder/*: all folders directly under "folder").
ast.target:
对于此处指定的每个文件夹，与当前打开文件位于同一文件夹中的文件
                将显示在导航标题中。可以指定多个文件夹
                （每行输入一个路径）。支持 Glob 模式
                （例如，**：所有文件夹；*：根目录下的所有直接子文件夹；
                folder/*：位于“folder”下的所有文件夹）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Specify the folder paths to exclude. Multiple folders can be specified
                (enter one path per line). Glob patterns are supported.
ast.target:
指定要排除的文件夹路径。可以指定多个文件夹
                （每行输入一个路径）。支持 Glob 模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to include files in subfolders.
ast.target: 是否包含子文件夹中的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude files that match these patterns partially. Enter one per line.
ast.target: 排除部分匹配这些模式的文件。每行输入一个。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to enable regular expressions for include/exclude patterns.
ast.target: 是否为包含/排除模式启用正则表达式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify whether to use file names or property values for include/exclude patterns.
ast.target: 指定包含/排除模式使用文件名还是属性值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
The name of the property to filter by.
                This is required when "Filter by" is set to "Property".
ast.target:
用于筛选的属性名称。
                当“筛选依据”设置为“属性”时必填。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
The name of the property to sort by.
                This is required when "Sort by" is set to "Property".
ast.target:
用于排序的属性名称。
                当“排序依据”设置为“属性”时必填。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
The maximum number of folder links to display.
                For example, if set to 3, the display would look like
                <prev3 prev2 prev1 | parent | next1 next2 next3>.
ast.target:
要显示的文件夹链接的最大数量。
                例如，设置为 3 时，显示将如下所示：
                <prev3 prev2 prev1 | parent | next1 next2 next3>。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Specify the display style of prev/next/parent links in the navigation header.
                Full: < previous | parent | next >,
                Full (double separator): < previous || parent || next >,
                Separator: previous | parent | next,
                Double separator: previous || parent || next,
                None: previous parent next.
ast.target:
指定导航标题中 prev/next/parent 链接的显示样式。
                完整：< previous | parent | next >，
                完整（双分隔符）：< previous || parent || next >，
                分隔符：previous | parent | next，
                双分隔符：previous || parent || next，
                无：previous parent next。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%c尝试卸载状态代理，而不是组件
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在第一次调用时重置边界
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
